metadata.title: 学习汉语 - Learn Chinese Online
metadata.description: Free Chinese learning website from HSK 1 to HSK 6. Lessons, vocabulary, grammar, practice and dictionary.

nav.hsk1Desc: The most basic vocabulary and grammar.
nav.hsk4Desc: Discuss more complex and varied topics.
nav.hsk5Desc: Read newspapers and watch movies without subs.
nav.hsk6Desc: Master the language like a native speaker.
nav.vocabularyDesc: Learn words by theme and HSK level.

auth.modalDescription: Sign in to start your Chinese learning journey

hero.title: Learn Chinese
hero.description: Complete lesson system from HSK 1 to HSK 6. Vocabulary, grammar, practice and many free support tools.

lessons.title: Structured lessons
lessons.description: Curriculum designed following HSK standards, from basic to advanced.

vocabulary.title: Rich vocabulary
vocabulary.description: Thousands of words with pinyin, translations and example sentences.

grammar.title: Detailed grammar
grammar.description: Clear grammar explanations with practical examples.

practice.title: Diverse practice
practice.description: Quizzes, flashcards, writing practice and listening exercises.

dictionaryFeature.title: Handy dictionary
dictionaryFeature.description: Quick Chinese-English lookup with pinyin pronunciation.

progress.title: Track progress
progress.description: View your personal learning statistics and progress.

vocabulary.title: HSK Vocabulary
vocabulary.subtitle: Lookup and learn Chinese vocabulary according to HSK 1-6 standards
vocabulary.noWordsFound: No vocabulary found. Please start the backend server.

hsk.title: HSK Levels
hsk.subtitle: Choose the level that suits you

cta.title: Ready to start your journey?
cta.description: Sign up for free and start learning Chinese today.

pandaChat.name: Panda Assistant
pandaChat.subtitle: Ask me anything!
pandaChat.greeting: Hello! 🎋 I'm Panda, your Chinese learning assistant. Ask me anything!

replies.hello: Hello! 😊 Nice to meet you! What would you like to learn today?
replies.hsk: HSK has 6 levels, from HSK 1 (beginner) to HSK 6 (advanced). You can start from HSK 1 and work your way up! 📚
replies.vocabulary: Vocabulary is key! Check out the Vocabulary section to learn by topic and HSK level. I recommend using Flashcards for better retention! 🀄
replies.grammar: Chinese grammar isn't too hard! Visit the Grammar section for detailed explanations with real examples. 📝
replies.lesson: Head to the Lessons section to get started! Lessons are organized by HSK standards, from easy to advanced. 🎯
replies.practice: Practice makes perfect! Quizzes, flashcards, writing and listening exercises are waiting for you. 💪
replies.name: I'm Panda 🐼, your Chinese learning assistant on 学习汉语!
replies.default: Hmm, I didn't quite get that 🤔 You can ask me about lessons, vocabulary, grammar or HSK levels!
